support.summary: No CEO-irreplaceable action; escalation is a rep/manager VP intro, not a CEO lever
support.detail: This $200k Intermountain Health deal is stalled on a missing Economic Buyer, not on any commercial or roadmap block. The pack's own next move is to press champion Jonathan Kempton for a VP (DTS Business Operations) intro or escalate to the owner's manager Alexa Bradley for an exec connect to business-apps leadership. No pricing approval, roadmap commitment, presales guarantee, or peer-CEO relationship is required, and zero commercial discussion has occurred. A CRO/RSD can drive this.
support.why_not_vp: The only executive move here is a VP-to-VP / manager-led intro to Intermountain's business-apps leadership; the deal owner's manager (Alexa Bradley) can facilitate this without the CEO.

monitor.reason: Our post-demo follow-up package is unsent 10 days past its due date while the deal waits on us, not the buyer.

triggers.summary: Post-demo Showpad package unsent 10 days after the 26 Jun demo
triggers.detail: After the 26 Jun Intermountain demo, Zycus owed Jonathan Kempton a Showpad package (meeting recording, healthcare customer references, ANA white papers, plus the no-cost value-engineering assessment and 4-week ANA pilot details) and an ROI model template. Both items were logged due 26 Jun and the team's own recommended move targeted delivery by 1 Jul, yet both remain 'open' and unsent as of 6 Jul. This is our lapse, not buyer-dependent, and it is exactly the material Jonathan needs to socialize internally and unlock the still-missing VP / business-apps intro; if it keeps slipping we hand the buyer's stated 'defer to 2027' status-quo default more room and stall a $200k Formal-Evaluation deal.
triggers.metric: Showpad + ROI package 10 days outstanding (due 26 Jun, unsent as of 6 Jul; missed 1 Jul target)
triggers.ceo_ask: Ask Rick Taranek why the post-demo Showpad package and ROI template promised to Jonathan Kempton are still unsent 7 days after the 26 Jun demo, and whether that is what's blocking the VP intro.
triggers.evidence: our_open_deliverables: 'Prepare and email Showpad package (meeting recording, customer references, product materials) to Jonathan' and 'Include details about the no-cost value-engineering assessment and the 4-week ANA pilot' - both due 2026-06-26, status 'open'; recommended_moves still list 'Deliver complete Showpad package ... by 1 Jul'.
